+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct LottieItemComponent {
+  @State animationPath: string = ''
+  @State lottieController: LottieController | null = null
+
+  getFileName(path: string): string {
+    return path.split('/').pop()?.replace('.json', '') || ''
+  }
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: { animationPath: string, lottieController: LottieController }) {
+    this.animationPath = params.animationPath
+    this.lottieController = params.lottieController
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    Column() {
+      LottieView({
+        loop: true,
+        autoplay: true,
+        autoSkip: true,
+        path: $rawfile(this.animationPath),
+        controller: this.lottieController,
+      })
+        .width('60%')
+        .height('30%')
+        .aspectRatio(1)
+        .backgroundColor('#F1F3F5')
+        .margin(10)
+        .onClick(() => {
+          this.lottieController?.play()
+        })
+      Text(this.getFileName(this.animationPath))
+        .fontSize(14)
+        .margin({ top:
